betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Multiblock Tank Structure§f

§aBuild massive free-form fluid storage tanks!§f
Pressure Pipes multiblock tanks can be built in §bany shape§f as long as all blocks are connected.

§6Tank Controller§f (`pressure:tank_controller`):
The §bmain block§f of the tank. Required for operation.
§cWarning: If broken, all contents are lost!§f

§6Tank Block§f (`pressure:tank_block`):
Base storage block. Each adds §b32 buckets§f of capacity. Up to §e50 allowed§f.

§6Tank Indicator Block§f (`pressure:tank_indicator`):
Functions as a Tank Block (+32 buckets). Displays the §bcurrent fluid level§f visually. Multiple can be stacked vertically for a larger display.

§6Tank Pressure Intake§f (`pressure:tank_pressure_input`):
Accepts fluids from §bHigh Pressure Pipes§f. Up to §e10 allowed§f.

§6Tank Pressure Outlet§f (`pressure:tank_pressure_output`):
Pushes fluids into §bHigh Pressure Pipes§f automatically. Up to §e6 sides can output§f, each with a unique color. Configurable from the Tank GUI.

§6Tank Structure Limits§f:
§b• 1§f Controller
§b• Up to 50§f storage blocks (Tank + Indicator)
§b• Up to 10§f input blocks (Pressure + Fluid intakes)
§b• Up to 6§f output connections
§b• Up to 10§f interfaces and 10 sensors each
